headline: Science on the Square!
summary: Radiant recently joined in NAU NASA Space Grant Program’s event Science on the Square in downtown Flagstaff. Utilizing presentation posters, drones, and live data streaming from remote sensing instruments, we brought Radiant research into view so curious citizen scientists could experience remote sensing up close. We talked through how LiDAR, UAVs, and satellite observations support wildfire mapping, environmental monitoring, and planetary science, all while enjoying community and sunny weather at Heritage Square.
imageAlt: Radiant researchers at a downtown outreach booth with remote sensing displays and a multi-rotor drone
